criteria.reason: Executor live context now includes current region derived from local SDE, and prompt guidance explicitly covers current-location phrasing.
The change keeps private ESI behind the existing capability-gated path and still fails closed to null for live-context fetch failures.
Targeted regression tests for region-resolution and prompt behavior pass, along with typecheck, lint, and build.
Evidence captures the production server findings and clearly separates proxy/API behavior from app-side live-context behavior and unrelated decrypt failures.
